hero.title: Kũhoya mũbango wa gũteithĩka
hero.lead: IATF nĩ ĩcũũranagia ciũria cia kũhingia mĩbango ya ũkinyanĩria ĩrĩa yoimĩraga harĩ mabataro ma ma.
support: Ndũbataraga gũtaarĩria maũndũ mothe ma mũrimũ ũcio, no mũhaka ũmenye mathĩna marĩa ũrehaga, arĩa ũhutagia, na kĩrĩa gĩtũmaga ũkorũo ũrĩ wa bata.

intro: Mĩthiĩre yothe ĩkoragwo na ũthuthuria ũmwe.

items.label: Thĩinĩ wa Intaneti
items.body: Hũthĩra fomu ĩrĩa ĩrĩ haha mũhuro kũheana ihoya rĩtaarĩirio wega.

items.label: Marũa ma Kĩrĩ Intaneti
items.body: Twandĩkĩre marũa kũrĩ: {{contact.requestsEmail}}Marũa ma kũhoya kũgerera e-mail no matuĩke marũa ma kũũria ma kũguũrio thutha wa gũthuthuria na gũthondeka marũa macio.

items.label: Gũkararania
items.body: Kwahoteka no wambĩrĩrie hau angĩkorũo ũcio nĩguo ũndũ ũrĩa mũhũthũ.

guidance.title: Mbere ya gũtũma ihoya
paragraphs: IATF ĩrutaga wĩra thĩiniĩ wa mũingĩ.

Ndũkaahũthĩre marũa ma kũrĩa ũikaraga, namba cia thimũ, maũndũ megiĩ ũrigitani, kana ũhoro ũngĩgũteithia kũmenya mũndũ ũrĩa ũrahũthĩra indo cia gũteithĩrĩria, tiga angĩkorũo nĩ ũrabatara gwĩka ũguo na nĩ wĩtĩkĩrĩtie IATF ĩcirie ũhoro ũcio.
IATF nĩ yeheragia maũndũ matarĩ ma bata ma kwaranĩria na andũ ĩtanathondeka marũa ma kũhoya ũteithio.

review.title: Gũthuthuria maũndũ marĩa merĩgĩrĩirũo
paragraphs: Kũheana marũa ma gwetha ũteithio ti kuuga atĩ nĩ ũkũheo ũteithio ũcio.
IATF nĩ ĩcũũranagia ciũria ciĩgiĩ ũhoti wa wĩra ũcio, ũhotekeku, ũhũthĩri, na kana wĩra ũcio nĩ wagĩrĩire kũrekererio kũrĩ andũ othe.
Ihoya rĩmwe no rĩregwo, rĩrũgamĩrio, kana rĩcenjio mbere ya gwĩtĩkĩrũo.

fields.name: mũndũ ũrĩa ũrahoya ũteithio
fields.label: Rĩĩtwa rĩaku kana rĩa kĩama gĩaku

fields.name: Ũhoro Makĩria
fields.label: Ũhoro wa kwaranĩria
fields.helper: Andirethi ya e-mail kana ndemwa ya Discord ya kũrũmĩrĩra.
fields.placeholder: Andirethi ya e-mail kana kĩhũngĩro kĩa Discord

fields.name: rũthiomi
fields.label: Rũthiomi
fields.helper: Rũthiomi rũrĩa wendete, angĩkorũo nĩ rũrabatarania.

fields.name: thĩna
fields.label: Nĩ thĩna ũrĩkũ ũrageria kũniina?
fields.helper: Taarĩria mũhĩnga ũcio na njĩra hũthũ.

fields.name: extraŨhoro ũrĩa ũrĩ thĩinĩ wa gĩcunjĩ gĩkĩ
fields.label: Maũndũ mangĩ
fields.helper: Taarĩria ũndũ ũngĩ ũngĩgũteithia gũtaarĩria bata wa ũndũ ũcio: kĩrĩa gĩtũmaga ũkorũo ũrĩ wa bata, cionereria, ũhoro ũngĩhũthĩrũo, rĩciria inene rĩa programu, kana mĩhaka ya mahinda.

fields.name: openSourceConsent (Wĩtĩkĩria)
fields.label: Hihi nĩ ũiguaga ũiganĩire nĩ ũndũ wa gũteithĩrĩria andũ arĩa angĩ?
fields.helper: Mĩbango ĩrĩa ĩtĩkĩrĩkĩte ĩkoragwo ĩrĩ ya ũiguano na IATF.

items: Gĩikaro kĩa mũingĩ thĩinĩ wa rũhonge rwa IATF GitHub
injinia ũrĩa ũrutaga wĩra mũbango-inĩ ũcio

ũtuĩria wa mũingĩ thĩinĩ wa mũtambo ũcio

header.title: Kĩũria kĩhũthũ na kĩa ĩmwe kwa ĩmwe nĩ kĩiganu kwambĩrĩria

paragraphs: Angĩkorũo nĩ ũrabatara ũteithio na nĩ ũrona atĩ no ũhũthĩrũo mũbango-inĩ wa andũ othe, no ũtũtũmĩre ũteithio ũcio.
